footer.description: The reference platform for academic, university, and professional guidance in Madagascar.
footer.copyright: OrientMad — Academic, university, and professional guidance in Madagascar

home.hero_subtitle: The modern, comprehensive, and local guidance platform.
home.hero_desc: Explore fields, take our RIASEC test, and find your path.
home.explore_section_desc: Access local resources to make the best decisions.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.cv_generator_desc: Automatically generate a professional CV suggestion based on your orientation test results, edit it, and download it as PDF.

ressources.title: Learning & Documents Hub
ressources.subtitle: Educational resources and professional documents tailored to your path.
ressources.select_level_desc: To suggest the most relevant documents and courses, select your current situation:
ressources.level_lycee_desc: Access theoretical courses, practical exercises, textbooks, and past BACC exam papers.
ressources.level_bachelier_desc: Find past entrance exam papers (ESP Vontovorona, Medicine Ankatso...) and guides to succeed in your transition to university.
ressources.level_universite_desc: Download CV templates, cover letters, and guides for your internship reports and Master's thesis.
ressources.search_placeholder: Search for a course, subject, template...
ressources.empty_msg: No resources available for this category.
